rows.label: tev035991_MSG0001
rows.name:
This is the worst day of my life,
isn't it? What am I going to doooooo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035991_MSG0002
rows.name: Oh, wait! You! Can you help, maybe?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035991_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Wow, I can't believe that that actually
worked. I guess screaming loudly and looking
upset actually pays off, doesn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035991_MSG0004
rows.name:
It turns out that I dropped my comm
device somewhere, and I CANNOT live
without it, you understand?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035991_MSG0005
rows.name:
It's pretty much the only way I have of contacting
my friends when I want to hang out, isn't it? And
how else can I surf FrontierNet when I'm bored?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035991_MSG0006
rows.name:
Anyway, I'm sure you can see how this
is a really horrible situation, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035991_MSG0007
rows.name:
And look, I'm not going to ask you to find it for
me, but do you think you could at least maybe point
me in the the direction of a good intel dealer?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035991_JNK0010
rows.name: Suggest[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035991_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell Beberta to speak with Chacha the intel dealer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035991_JNK0020
rows.name: Extort[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035991_SEL0021
rows.name: Demand an introduction fee for introducing Beberta to an info dealer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035991_MSG0008
rows.name:
That's a Nopon, yes? Good idea. I
bet this Chacha character could
find my device in no time, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035991_MSG0009
rows.name:
I'll get in touch with
him and see, I suppose?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035991_MSG0010
rows.name:
...What's that? Chacha's services
cost money? Er, how how much money?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035991_MSG0011
rows.name:
...Wait, THAT MUCH? Nope. Nope nope nope.
Forget it, all right? To pay those kind
of fees, I'd need to to get a job.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035991_MSG0012
rows.name:
I'd rather be bored than complicate
my life with something as taxing
as actual labor, if you follow?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035991_MSG0013
rows.name:
And here I thought you came along to
help, maybe? Nice try, con artist![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035991_MSG0014
rows.name:
If it's going to cost me money, then
forget it, all right? I'll just learn
to to live without a device...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035991_MSG0015
rows.name: But I'll be free, you know? So so free.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035991_MSG0016
rows.name:
Wow, I feel great now! Like I just took the
shackles of life and and unshackled them,
you know? Thanks, unscrupulous person![ST:wait ]
